lines: {actor} typed "mb" in party chat.
{actor} is now "questioning their life choices."
Half the party is suddenly somewhere they should not be.
Someone pinged the boss. Helpful.
{actor} inspects {target}'s gear mid-pull. Bold.
{actor} pulls the pack clean. Textbook.
Kill Order holds. The deaths stay apart.
{actor} stabilizes the pull. Crisis averted.
The cooldowns line up. Boss melts.
{actor} — CRITICAL — {n} to {target}. It does not get up.
{actor} crits for {n}. The parse twitches upward.
CRITICAL. {target} folds.
{actor} glances the blow. Half damage. Healer exhales.
{target} dodges clean. Nothing lands.
A glancing hit. {actor} barely feels it.
{actor} blows a cooldown. The wipe is averted — barely.
Two absorbs land just in time.
{actor} is out of mana.
{actor} tops the party off and immediately regrets the mana spend.
{actor} ignored the assignment. The cast goes through.
{actor} is dragged into the dark. Morale -20.
{actor} stood in it. Again.
{actor} has left the dungeon.
{boss} begins {ability} — interrupt assigned to {actor}…
The mechanic resolves. Mostly.
A telegraph blooms under {target}.
Bursting stacks at {n}. {actor} is holding the deaths apart.
…which spikes Bursting to {n}. That was greedy.
Spiteful ghost spawns. It picks the lowest parse: {target}.
A ghost peels off toward {target}. Of course it does.
The pack sits in its own Sanguine pool, healing. {actor} sighs.
Move out of the red, {actor}. Please.
